text: Being thanked and drawn into this 'special video' experience, I am acutely aware of the intentionality behind each element of this space. The glass-walled room, the quiet corridor, the crisp lighting—all seem poised on the threshold between emptiness and imminent activity. In the adjacent vibrant installation, the R+D display amplifies my sense of liminality; the words and light immerse me in a state of attentive curiosity. I feel like a witness to a moment of transition, present both as observer and as a quiet participant in something unfolding, inviting reflection on the relationship between self, space, and shared experience.
